TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dave_Allen_(actor), title = Dave_Allen_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dave_Allen_(actor)} }

S.FORM: == Dave Allen == kawas tay 1958, Dave Allen, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux nya Allen htgan ru mrkyas beh Naperville, Illinois. hiya mason pqwasan biru maki Naperville, Central . maki qasa hiya "Groover" lalu nya. suruw lga, "Gruber" lalu nya. mincyogun nya hiya ga semon hmyapas squliq. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

== Dave Allen == kawas tay 1958, Dave Allen, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux nya Allen htgan ru mrkyas beh Naperville, Illinois. hiya mason pqwasan biru maki Naperville, Central . maki qasa hiya "Groover" lalu nya. suruw lga, "Gruber" lalu nya. mincyogun nya hiya ga semon hmyapas squliq. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: == *a*e allen == kawas~ɕ taj ****, *a*e allen, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qjanux nja allen ħtɣan ru mrkjas~ɕ βeħ naper*ille, illinois~ɕ. ħija mas~ɕon pqwas~ɕan βiru maki naper*ille, ʦ~ʨentral . maki qas~ɕa ħija "ɣroo*er" lalu nja. s~ɕuruw lɣa, "ɣruβer" lalu nja. minʦ~ʨjoɣun nja ħija ɣa s~ɕemon ħmjapas~ɕ s~ɕquliq. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
